title: gamochaeta antillana
intro: Gamochaeta antillana, also known as Antillean false chamomile or false chamomile, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Gamochaeta antillana include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and relieving respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas and infusions, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water to harness its medicinal properties.
